description:
When try_reduce_call returns None and the call survives unchanged
(no rewrite from reduce_terminator), write \`Stalled\` at the same
CallsiteId.

This includes:
- Calls to boundary fns (\`@spec\`'d) — Stalled by policy.
- Calls where args aren't all literal-Descr.
- Calls where the recursive walk fails (e.g. closure_typed_captures'
  apply1 call surviving today — write Stalled).

Cont slots (EmitSlot::Cont) are NOT written by the reducer in this
ticket; they remain typer-only emissions (per game-walk finding).

## Acceptance

- closure_typed_captures: callsite_outcomes has Stalled entries for
  add_to(10,20), apply1(closure_lit, 12) callsites.
- fib_tailrec: Stalled for fib(20, 0, 1).
- ast_eval: Stalled for the print callsites (print never folds).
- All 842 tests green.

## Removes

Nothing yet.
title: fz-CO.B.2 — Reducer publishes Stalled outcomes
